notes: Temperature 0 and top_p 1 minimize sampling variance. The current BAR reference implementation executes this model pin through LiteLLM's OpenRouter provider path (`openrouter/anthropic/claude-opus-4.6`). That path does not expose a deterministic seed parameter; seed is null to document that fact rather than claim determinism the model does not offer. Provider guardrails are policy-bound too: each reviewer call is limited to 180 seconds and retried at most once before the runner fails closed to `insufficient_evidence`. Per §5 of bar-review-pipeline.md, determinism is claimed at the verdict level via empirical stability checks across three independent runs, not at the text level.
